description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. Define stages docker, build, test, clean. In the docker stage add a docker job that runs docker build -t img:latest . then docker save img:latest -o img.tar, caches img.tar, and pushes the cache. In the build stage add a build job that loads img.tar with docker load -i img.tar, runs docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/project img:latest /bin/sh -c "cd /project && mkdir build && echo 'Hello World' > build/file.txt", caches img.tar and the build/ directory. In the test stage add a test job that loads img.tar and runs docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/project img:latest /bin/sh -c "cat /project/build/file.txt", also using the same cache. In the clean stage add a clean job that removes all files under /cache with (cd /cache && rm -rf *) || true.
